_meta.description: PAX trees for the pyromancer. Two branches; each path shares a universal trunk.

nodes.name: Coming in Hot
nodes.desc: Deals 15% more damage to enemies above 80% health and 30% more damage to enemies below 30% health.

nodes.name: Ashen Regalia
nodes.desc: Killing MARKED enemies increases your damage mitigation by 7% for 6 seconds. Stack up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Ashen Wake
nodes.desc: Your shots damage all enemies afflicted with Ash within a 4 meter radius of the target, dealing 30% of the damage dealt.

nodes.name: Hot Streak
nodes.desc: Critical Shots increase Weapon Damage by 6%. Bonus lasts 4 seconds and stack up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Carbonization
nodes.desc: Enemies hit by your IMMOBILIZE skills receive 20% more Anomaly Damage for 4 seconds.

nodes.name: Carbon Footprint
nodes.desc: Each enemy hit by your IMMOBILIZE skills reduce the cooldown of the other Immobilize skill by 0.5 second.

nodes.name: Carbon Ammo
nodes.desc: Increases your magazine size by 200%

nodes.name: Bullet Frenzy
nodes.desc: Shots with Assault Weapons increase your weapon damage by 3%. The effect s tacks until you stop shooting.

nodes.name: Solar Flare
nodes.desc: Activating skills increases your critical damage by 10% for 6 seconds. Stacking up to 2 times.

nodes.name: Critical Mass
nodes.desc: Critical Shots on Marked enemies turn all shots to critical shots

nodes.name: Melting point
nodes.desc: Increase your resistance Piercing by 15% when above 80% HEALTH and by 30% when below 40% health.

nodes.name: Scorched Flesh
nodes.desc: Activating ignite skills increases your status power by 10% for 5 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.

nodes.name: Master Exploder
nodes.desc: Explosive Skill damage is increased by 100% of your resistance piercing..

nodes.name: Convection
nodes.desc: Reduce all skills cooldown by 4 seconds when all skills are on cooldown  - 3 seconds cooldown.

nodes.name: Furnace
nodes.desc: Increase your Status Power by 15% for every enemy afflicted with Burn. Stacks up to 5 times.

nodes.name: Burnt Offerings
nodes.desc: Increase your burn duration by 500% and each consecutive Burn tick on an enemy deals 10% more damage.

nodes.name: Conduction
nodes.desc: Reduce your skill cooldown by 15%.

nodes.name: Arsonist
nodes.desc: Activating skills has a 30% chance to reset all skill cooldowns. 5 seconds cooldown.

nodes.name: Backdraft
nodes.desc: Your anomaly Power is increased by 30% for every skill on cooldown.

nodes.name: Trigger Sequence
nodes.desc: Activating explosive skills increase the damage of the next explosive skill by 25%. The buff stacks up to 3 times after which it starts anew.
